records.summary: Validated the 2026-06-14 afternoon first-line skill lane and closed the stale Hermes inbox item without a new code patch.
issues: The highest-priority Hermes request remained open even though the 2026-06-14 follow-builders report and output were already present and count-consistent.
lessons: Validate the stored report and output pair before re-running the afternoon follow-builders publisher for an old Hermes request.
reusable_rules: A stale afternoon first-line inbox item can be resolved after report/output existence and count parity are confirmed; do not regenerate same-day follow-builders content before the 16:10/16:30 window.

records.summary: Daily supervision now treats merged/open automation/community-intelligence date PRs as valid publication evidence; resolved 2026-06-17 and 2026-06-18 community Hermes requests after validating 2026-06-18 supervision.
Repaired Business Signals 2026-06-19 Top10/source-title fallback regression in frontstage build logic
checks: artifact replay build-v3-data-observation-desk.mjs on 2026-06-19 CI bundle
artifact replay assert-v3-source-first-frontstage.mjs passed with top10_count=10
issues: source-title boilerplate blocked display-ready fallback titles
trailing ellipsis caused source-first weak fact failures
risks: Local repo data remains at 2026-06-18 so same-day validation required artifact replay workspace
lessons: Fallback public titles must stay eligible when source titles collapse to boilerplate
Trim trailing ellipsis from source-backed facts before source-first gating
reusable_rules: derive public titles from source-backed facts instead of generic generated headlines

records.summary: Restored same-day Business Signals Top10 supply by preserving source-backed facts and aligning daily collection breadth.
issues: Business Signals workflow produced same-day cards but frontstage Top10 had fewer than 10 cards because valid source facts were lost or too few source facts were generated.
reusable_rules: Prefer source-backed card facts over title-derived replacement facts in strict frontstage normalization.

records.summary: Recovered 2026-06-21 Business Signals from GitHub artifacts, repaired frontstage title/fact overrides, rebuilt site/FDE/topic data, reran Community Intelligence with bounded local collection.
issues: Business workflow failed before local recovery
Community scheduled collection produced stale data
reusable_rules: Source title must be translated literally before frontstage display
Bounded community collection can recover when full detail crawl hangs
